tasks.title: Create scoring/checklist.json
tasks.acceptance: JSON file with 8 categories, 24 items, weights totaling 100

tasks.title: Create scoring/manual-score.template.json
tasks.acceptance: Template JSON with all manual-scored items, 1-5 scale, notes field

tasks.title: Implement scoring/auto-score.sh
tasks.acceptance: Script runs against a project dir, outputs JSON with pass/fail and counts for all auto items

tasks.title: Implement run.sh (environment setup + harness install + unattended execution)
tasks.acceptance: Script creates isolated $HOME per harness, installs each harness, runs claude -p with all control flags, saves output JSON per harness
notes: Plugin install automation for omc/superpowers needs validation
Must pass ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and optionally OPENAI_API_KEY

tasks.title: Create scoring/score-prompt.md (Chrome DevTools MCP visual scoring prompt)
tasks.acceptance: Prompt instructs Claude to: start dev server, detect port, navigate with Chrome MCP, screenshot 4 pages, score UX 1-5, output JSON

tasks.title: Implement scoring/visual-score.sh (Chrome DevTools MCP screenshot + AI scoring)
tasks.acceptance: Script runs claude -p with Chrome MCP config against each harness project, captures screenshots, outputs visual-score JSON

tasks.title: Implement collect.sh (aggregate scores + generate report.md)
tasks.acceptance: Script merges auto-score + visual-score + manual-score JSONs into scores.json, generates report.md with comparison tables and screenshot grid

tasks.title: Update benchmark.design.md (reflect automation changes)
tasks.acceptance: Design doc matches final automated pipeline: -p mode, Chrome MCP, $HOME isolation, --effort flag, port detection, budget estimate

tasks.title: Dry run: validate full pipeline with vanilla only
tasks.acceptance: run.sh executes vanilla successfully, auto-score + visual-score produce valid JSON, collect.sh generates report.md

tasks.title: Full benchmark execution (5 harnesses)
tasks.acceptance: All 5 harnesses complete, results in benchmarks/runs/, scores in benchmarks/results/

tasks.title: Human final review + report.md adjustments
tasks.acceptance: Report reviewed, screenshots verified, ready for public posting
